title: barbarea orthoceras subsp. dolichocarpa
intro: Barbarea orthoceras subsp. dolichocarpa is a subspecies of the Barbarea genus, commonly known as the yellow rocket or wild cabbage. It is a biennial plant with edible leaves and flowers, native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Barbarea orthoceras subsp. dolichocarpa include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions.
